passages.name: Start
passages.content:
This game is sometimes based on a random number generator when decisions or events are out of the player's control.
So feel free to play it multiple times over
Or use F5 to refresh and reroll

begin
passages.content_zh:
當決策或事件超出玩家的控制時，該遊戲有時會基於隨機數產生器。
所以請隨意玩多次
或使用F5刷新並重新滾動

開始

passages.name: begin
passages.content:
![img](images/Characters/You/Base/Naked.png)

You (Liam) always were a livid dreamer. Most of the times you had some form of control over your dreams.
One night however, you find yourself dreaming a little bit too real.
This is where your story begins
passages.content_zh:
![img](images/Characters/You/Base/Naked.png)
你（利亞姆）一直是個狂熱的夢想家。大多數時候，你對自己的夢想有某種形式的控制。
然而有一天晚上，你發現自己的夢有點太真實了。
這就是你的故事開始的地方

passages.name: your story begins
passages.content:
![img](images/Characters/You/Base/Pajamas.png)

It was a clear starry night.
You find yourself wandering through the woods
"How did I get here?" you say to yourself.
"Oh right... probably a dream"
![img](images/Scenes/Intro/Dreamforest01.png)
You look around you and recognise the place.
Just over the hill you find yourself a lake.
"That's lovers lake! I've been here before."
Then... suddenly, a large bang. You look up and see a small meteorite flying through the sky.
![img](images/Scenes/Intro/Dreamforest02.png)
It crashes at the other side of the lake.
You're interested. At first you started walking around the lake but then you remembered it was a dream and you ran across the water towards where the rock crashed into the dirt.
"Cool" you think to yourself
As you arrive at the crash site you see that the ground is glowing near a crooked birch tree.
You go over there and pick up the rock with your bare hands
You drop it again for it is icy cold
"But how? It was burning through the skies just a second ago"
You take off your shirt and wrap it around the rock before picking it up again.
Now the rock doesn't burn your hands.
You get back home and try to sell the rock to a witch walking by.
You vaguely recognise this 'witch'

![img](images/Characters/Emily/WitchCostumePose01.png)

It's Emily, she was dressed as a witch last halloween
You know Emily since kindergarten. You were never really friends but somehow ended up in the same class each year. You would describe Emily as an average girl.
Emily wants to buy the rock for 150.000 euros
"Deal" you eagerly say.
Next thing you know you're in your mansion in the backyard.
You see a swimming pool and decide to jump in immediately.
After you take a leap. You seem to keep falling... and falling...
You're really scared now. The water just isn't getting any closer
"Now wait a minute" you think to yourself "this isn't fun. I think I'm done. I want to wake up now"
You try...

Path $RandomNumber out of 2
And it doesn't work...
you look around\
And succeed
you wake up
passages.content_zh:
![img](images/Characters/You/Base/Pajamas.png)

那是一個晴朗的星夜。
你發現自己在樹林裡徘徊
「我怎麼到這裡來了？」你對自己說。
“哦，對了……可能是一個夢”
![img](images/Scenes/Intro/Dreamforest01.png)
你環顧四周，認出了這個地方。
翻過小山，你會發現一個湖。
“那是情人湖！我以前來過這裡。”
然後……突然，一聲巨響。你抬頭一看，看到一顆小隕石從天空飛過。
![img](images/Scenes/Intro/Dreamforest02.png)
它在湖的另一邊墜毀。
你有興趣。起初你開始繞著湖走，但後來你記起這是一個夢，你跑過水面，朝岩石撞入泥土的地方跑去。
「酷」你自己想
當您到達墜機地點時，您會看到一棵彎曲的白樺樹附近的地面正在發光。
你走到那邊，徒手撿起石頭
你又把它丟掉了，因為它是冰冷的
“但是怎麼辦？前一秒還燃燒著天空呢”
你脫下襯衫，將它包裹在岩石上，然後再把它撿起來。
現在石頭不會燒傷你的手了。
你回到家並試圖把石頭賣給路過的女巫。
你隱約認識這個‘女巫’

![img](images/Characters/Emily/WitchCostumePose01.png)

這是艾米莉，去年萬聖節她打扮成女巫
你從幼稚園就認識艾米莉了。你們從來都不是真正的朋友，但不知何故每年都在同一個班級。你會把艾米麗描述為一個普通的女孩。
艾米麗想以 15 萬歐元購買這塊岩石
你急切地說「成交」。
接下來你知道你已經在後院的豪宅裡了。
你看到一個游泳池，決定立刻跳進去。
當你飛躍之後。你似乎一直在跌倒…一直跌倒…
你現在真的很害怕。水並沒有變得更近
“現在等一下，”你心裡想，“這不好玩。我想我已經完成了。我現在想醒來”
你試試看...

路徑 $RandomNumber，共 2 個
而且這不起作用...
你環顧四周\
並成功
你醒來

passages.name: you wake up
passages.content:
![img](images/Characters/You/Base/Student.png)

You wake up with the feeling that you're still falling
"Oh god" You feel motionsick but you're happy to wake up in your own bedroom again.
that was such a weird dream
You do your morning routine and head off to school. Still remembering that vague dream.

	
		
At the end of the day you decide to study a little more. However when you went to the bus stop you just missed the last bus home.
		
At the end of the day you find out your car has run out of gas.
		
At the end of the day you find out your bike is stolen.
	

Guess you'll have to walk home
passages.content_zh:
![img](images/Characters/You/Base/Student.png)
你醒來時感覺自己仍在墜落
「天哪」你感到暈車，但你很高興再次在自己的臥室醒來。
那真是個奇怪的夢
你做完早上的例行公事然後去學校。至今還記得那個模糊的夢。

	
		
一天結束時，您決定再學習一點。然而，當你去公車站時，你錯過了回家的末班車。
		
一天結束時，您發現您的汽車沒油了。
		
一天結束時，您發現您的自行車被偷了。
	

我猜你得步行回家

passages.name: walk home
passages.content:
As you're walking home it is already dark. You think about your dream and how real it was when suddenly, ZOOOOOOF BANG!!!
Something just flew over the trees and crashed not that far from you
"it can't be" you mumble to yourself
You follow the sound and sure enough, it came from the other side of Lovers Lake.
The curiousity gets the better of you and you decide to investigate
For a moment you try to recreate your dream and walk over the lake, and congratulations, you now have wet socks.
You walk around the lake, wich is lucky for you more of a large pond
they should've just named it Lovers Lagoon
You tracked the meteorite towards the exact same spot as in your dreams, just by the weird birch tree.
You decide to pee on the rock to see if it's hot. As it turns out, it's not.
You pick up the rock.
"Oh gross" you exclaim.
The rock seems to be covered in some sort of organic matter wich is now terribly moist because you decided to pee over it.
You put the rock in your backpack, wich lucky for your books always contains a plastic bag.
You continue the walk home trying to think what to do with the rock.
passages.content_zh:
當你走回家時，天已經黑了。當你想到你的夢想以及它是多麼真實時，突然，ZOOOOOOF BANG！
有東西剛好飛過樹林，墜落在離你不遠的地方
「這不可能」你自言自語
循聲而去，果然是從情人湖對岸傳來的。
好奇心戰勝了你，你決定調查
有那麼一刻，你嘗試重現你的夢想並在湖上行走，恭喜你，你的襪子現在已經濕了。
你繞著湖走，幸運的是你還有一個大池塘
他們應該把它命名為情人潟湖
你追蹤隕石，飛向與夢中一模一樣的地方，就在那棵奇怪的白樺樹旁。
你決定在岩石上撒尿，看看它是否熱。事實證明，事實並非如此。
你撿起石頭。
「哦，太噁心了」你驚呼道。
岩石似乎覆蓋著某種有機物，現在非常潮濕，因為你決定在上面撒尿。
你把石頭放進背包裡，幸運的是你的書總是有一個塑膠袋。
你繼續走回家，思考如何處理這塊岩石。

In your dream you certainly sold the rock but you're not sure if you would in real-life.

You finally arrive at home. It's late.

You decide to go to bed immediately not finished

passages.name: you look around
passages.content:
While you still feel like you're falling. You're actually floating. You calm down a bit. Then you hear Emily laughing. She's holding the stone.

![img](images/Characters/Emily/WitchCostumeEvilPose01.png)

"You fool" she sais. "With the power of this stone, a trained witch like me can do anything she wants"
"Oh shut up" You say. She didn't like that you interrupted her. You tell her: "It's my dream, I have control"
She smiles after hearing that. "Do you?" She asks "Then... why didn't you wake up?"
why indeed? Usually you have some control over these kind of things.
"I tell you why" Emily continues "It's because you weren't dreaming. I put a little sleep curse over you and dragged you to the forest. Then right around the time the return of the Cursidius Rock was foretold I waked you up while watching from a distance. You see, I couldn't grab the stone myself for it is protected against witches. Only mortals can handle the stone. There is however one way to surpass that and that will be if one were to hand the stone over willingly. I tricked you into giving me the stone"
You took some time to process what is happening. In the meanwhile Emily put you back on the ground.
"But.. why me?" You utter
"Because you live close-by, I already know you wich makes it a bit less awkward, plus you were born a male, wich makes you an easy target" She answers.
"Born a male?" you say a bit confused "I beg your pardon, I still am!"
You're a bit offended

Path $RandomNumber out of 2
You still think this is your dream
You pull down your pants
\
You don't think this is really your dream

She chuckles. "I know, I know. But those things can change. You know... Magic and all. Especially with this stone I can easily make you into a girl but that wouldn't change your soul. Even if I changed your mind to believe you were a girl your soul will always be 'male-born'."
__UNFINISHED__
passages.content_zh:
當你仍然感覺自己正在墜落時。你其實是漂浮著的。你稍微冷靜一下。然後你聽到艾米麗笑了。她手裡拿著石頭。

![img](images/Characters/Emily/WitchCostumeEvilPose01.png)
<跨距類別=“較小”>

“你這個傻瓜”她說。 “有了這塊石頭的力量，像我這樣訓練有素的女巫就可以做任何她想做的事”
「哦，閉嘴」你說。她不喜歡你打擾她。你告訴她：“這是我的夢想，我有掌控權”
她聽後笑了。 “你？”她問：“那……你為什麼還不醒？”
確實為什麼？通常你對這些事情有一定的控制權。
「我告訴你為什麼，」艾米麗繼續說道，「因為你沒有在做夢。我對你施加了一個睡眠詛咒，然後把你拖到了森林裡。然後就在預言庫西迪烏斯岩石回歸的時候，我在遠處觀看時叫醒了你。
你花了一些時間來處理正在發生的事情。同時，艾蜜莉把你放回地面。
「但是……為什麼是我？」你說出
「因為你住在附近，我已經認識你了，這樣就不會那麼尷尬了，再加上你生來是男性，這讓你很容易成為目標。」她回答。
“生來就是男的？”你有點困惑地說“對不起，我還是這樣！”
你有點生氣

路徑 $RandomNumber，共 2 個
你仍然認為這是你的夢想
你拉下褲子
\
你不認為這真的是你的夢想

她咯咯地笑。 「我知道，我知道。但那些事情會改變。你知道……魔法等等。尤其是有了這塊石頭，我可以輕鬆地將你變成一個女孩，但這不會改變你的靈魂。即使我改變了你的想法，相信你是一個女孩，你的靈魂將永遠是‘男性出生的’。”

You freak out. "Wait what! what the fuck?"
"You couldn't behave so I put away your toys" Emily comments. "Now put those pants back on"
With a flick your pants get back on your legs. But... with a once filled void down there. Your hand immediately go down there.

==You stick your hands in your pants==
You pat your hands over the space that is left

"Missing something?" Emily asks
"I... I'm not used to it being so spacious down there" You answer honestly
"That can be fixed" She sais just a little bit too joyfully
"Let's play some dress-up"

Before you know it you're back in your bedroom.

"Whaaaa!" you exclaim. "How did you?"
"Are you really this dense?" Emily asks "With this stone I am basically a genie. Without the curse offcourse"

Hearing that you try to reason with her

"So ehm... Emily. I honestly am sorry about earlier" You begin
Her eyes widen "go on..." she sais calmly
"I really thought I was in a dream of mine. It's... it's just too much to process and all..." You continue. You murmur a few more excuses and apologies while Emily sits down on your bed.

Path $RandomNumber out of 2
Emily believes you're sorry\
Emily doesn't buy it
passages.content_zh:
你嚇壞了。 “等等什麼！他媽的什麼？”
「你不守規矩，所以我把你的玩具收起來了」艾米麗評論道。 “現在把褲子穿上”
輕輕一抖，褲子就會回到腿上。但是...下面曾經充滿了空白。你的手立即落到那裡。

===你把手伸進褲子裡==
你用手拍拍剩下的空間

「缺少什麼東西嗎？」艾蜜莉問
「我……我不習慣下面這麼寬敞。」你老實回答
“這可以解決”她說得有點太高興了
“我們來玩一下換裝遊戲吧”

不知不覺間你就回到臥室了。

「哇啊啊！」你驚呼。 “你怎麼樣？”
“你的心真的這麼密嗎？”艾米麗問道：“有了這塊石頭，我基本上就是一個精靈。沒有詛咒當然”

聽到你試圖跟她講道理

「所以嗯......艾米麗。老實說，我對之前的事情感到抱歉」你開始
她睜大眼睛，平靜地說：“繼續…”
「我真的以為我是在做夢。這……實在是太多了，難以處理，而且……」你繼續說道。當艾蜜莉坐在你的床上時，你又低聲說了幾句藉口和道歉。

路徑 $RandomNumber，共 2 個
艾蜜莉相信你很抱歉\
艾米莉不買帳

passages.name: Emily believes you're sorry
passages.content:
Emily believes you're sorry

Emily sighs. "You know what... fine. I believe you. But don't you ever pull that on me or any other girl again. Not even in your dreams"
"I know, I'm sorry" You beg:"Can I please, please have my penis back"
She chuckles "I admit, it might be a bit my fault. That sleeping spell does make the target a bit hornier. But no, you will still suffer."
Panic sets in your eyes
"Dont worry, haha" She laughs as she sees your face "You'll only have to suffer an itsy-bitsy bit. Because we'll still play dress-up. We're good, dude"
"Thank you" you say. "But ehm... what exactly do you mean?" You ask
"Well first" She responds "Let's get you in some fitting clothes. These don't fit"
She snaps her fingers as your pants shrink up to some panties. Your buttoned shirt morphs into a transparent pink night-dress
You look at yourself in the mirror

當你的褲子縮成內褲時，她打了個響指。你的羈絆襯衫變成了透明的粉紅色睡裙

You're completely open to Emily. It's like you two have been close but that's not the truth. You barely know her apart from who she is.
"Well, it switched one weird feeling for another. These panties are quite skintight." You say
It feels very weird, the fabric rubbing past your new asset is something you still have to get used to. No wait, you don't want to get used to this.
"Ehm.. Emily?" you say
"Yeah, what's up?" She asks
"Do we really have to go through with this?" You ask her
"Yes we do. I have to practice with this powers. Don't worry, I got the theory down and used some artifacts before but those barely let me use a single spell. This one is an infinite source of power" She responds as she picks up the orb again as it starts to float.
You think about what she said earlier
"Well you said the power of a genie" you begin
"Yes?" She sais, expecting a follow up
"Well, could you like, grant my wishes to practise instead?" You ask timidly
"Well that's a boldthing to say after what you pulled on me" She sais annoyed
"I said I was sorry" You rebuke
"Hmm, I tell you what. Ask something and I will try to twist it, just like genies do in shows like anime" She smiles at the idea
"Don't worry, unlike those I can undo stuff"

You haven't thought this through enough. Even though the idea whe can undo things calms you, you still have to be carefull of what you wish for.

"Oh" she interrupts your thinking "I don't want to do reality altering things yet. Too much risks so keep it simple"

Simple, eh?

"How about... I wish to have my penis back?" you say
Emily thinks for a second and then pulls a disgusted face
"What?" you ask
"I thought about how I would twist it and in this case an evil genie would just hand you a floppy dick instead of switching back your genitals." She acts like she almost pukes "That's disgusting so let this just be a warning, blegh. Phrase your words carefully"

你對艾米麗完全開放。就好像你們兩個關係很親密，但事實並非如此。除了她是誰之外，你幾乎不了解她。

「我們真的必須經歷這一切嗎？」你問她
「是的，我們需要。我必須練習這種力量。別擔心，我之前已經掌握了理論並使用了一些神器，但那些幾乎不讓我使用一個法術。這個是無限的力量源泉」她回答道，當球體開始漂浮時，她再次拿起球體。

艾蜜莉想了一會兒，然後露出厭惡的表情
「什麼？」你問
「我想過如何扭轉它，在這種情況下，邪惡的精靈只會遞給你一根軟雞巴，而不是把你的生殖器轉回來。」她表現得幾乎要吐了，“這太噁心了，所以這只是一個警告，哎呀。小心措辭”

passages.name: fades into a new scene
passages.content:
You take a look around and notice you're in a college room. But not in the benches, no, you have your own table.
Emily smiles at you and start pointing at her new outfit.
"And... what do you think?"

![img](images/Scenes/Classroom/StudentTeacher.png)

You look at her "Well. You look good in a teacher uniform. But I have questions. Why does-"
She interrupts:"Nah-ah. First raise your hand."
You sigh and do so. Emily points at you and asks:"Yes, you. Girl in the front. Do you have a question?"
You lower your hand. "Well, yeah. What are we doing here?"
Emily:"What are we doing here, MISS"
"Really?" you ask her
Emily's eyes light up as she smiles at you:"Yes really. I'm going to have a class in a minute. They're first years and-"
"Ehm..." you interrupt her "Aren't you taking the roleplay too far, you're not seriously teaching are you?"
Emily glares:"Don't interrupt me again, I hate that." Then she smiles again.  "And yes, I will. I always wanted to try teaching and you gave me a reason to do it now with your sexy fantasy"
As she finishes her sentence, the doors in the back open and a group of student pours in.
passages.content_zh:
你環顧四周，發現自己身處大學教室裡。但不是在長凳上，不，你有自己的桌子。
艾米莉對你微笑，並開始指著她的新衣服。

![img](images/Scenes/Classroom/StudentTeacher.png)
“還有……你覺得怎麼樣？”

你看著她，“嗯。你穿老師制服很好看。但我有疑問。為什麼——”
她打斷道：“不啊。先舉手。”
你嘆了口氣，就這麼做了。 Emily指著你問：“是的，就是你。前面的女孩，你有什麼問題嗎？”
你放下手。 “嗯，是的。我們在這裡做什麼？”
艾米麗：“我們在這裡做什麼，小姐”
「真的嗎？」你問她
艾米麗對你微笑時眼睛一亮：“是的，真的。我馬上就要上課了。他們是一年級，而且——”
“呃……”你打斷她的話，“你是不是演得太過分了，你沒有認真教學吧？”
艾蜜莉瞪了他一眼：「別再打擾我了，我討厭這樣。」然後她又笑了。  「是的，我會的。我一直想嘗試教學，而你現在用你的性感幻想給了我一個理由”
當她說完這句話時，後面的門打開了，一群學生湧了進來。

passages.name: a group of student pours in.
passages.content:
At first they settle down as far to the back as possible but when they notice you the group moves more to the front of the room.
After a while Emily asks everyone to calm down and it gets quiet. Sort of.
While Emily introduces herself you can hear faint whispers from boys like:"Really? Someone as hot as her?" or "Dude, we're so lucky"
Now that you look over the class, while Emily is talking about herself and about the coming exams, you notice almost all of the boys looking at you. Only to look away whenever you make eye contact.
You're not at ease and a bit worried.

![img](images/Scenes/Classroom/Teaching.png)

You don't pay much attention to Emily. But then you hear Emily's tone shift.
"Now you might be wondering why this girl is sitting in front of the class"
YES, SO ARE YOU
"Her name is not important. What is important is today's subject:

當你開始抱寶寶時，你把迷你胸罩套在脖子上。你身上有這些肉塊真是奇怪。好吧，它們不僅在你身上，而且現在是你的一部分。
當你聽到主角說：「哦，這是什麼？」時，你幾乎忘了主角就站在你身後。
你整理好胸罩，回頭看著他。他拿起某種電話。
「它打開了一個應用程式。哦，看，這是你的 3D 模型。不過不是一個現實的模型，它幾乎沒有 GTA 5 的質量。讓我們看看，菜單...信息...*咳咳...哦有趣。所以如果我按下這個重置按鈕，它應該會讓你恢復正常。”
他轉身看著你。 “哦，那真快啊”
你看著自己，發現自己又穿了他姊姊的衣服。沒有新資產，卻懷念舊資產。
你好奇如何恢復正常，你問：“它還有其他功能嗎？比如，把我的陰莖還給我？或者給我換衣服？”
標記捲軸。 “有一個撤消按鈕，但它是灰色的，所以我猜這是基線。嗯……”他又滾動了一些“哦，這裡有一個功能，上面寫著‘符合身體’，我可以選擇一些衣櫃選項，這樣我就不必看到你的小傢伙了。你想嘗試一下嗎？”
你幾乎沒張開嘴，馬克就在說：“我在問誰，我做我想做的事。讓我們把你變成一個性感的女朋友，我在這件事上有很多功能。”
你試著大聲說出自己的立場，但由於馬克不再跟你說話，你又被靜音了。

passages.name: You investigate the rock
passages.content:
You take the bag out of your backpack and drop the rock in the sink. You throw away the stinky platic bag.
why the hell did I have to be so stupid to pee on the thing? I'm sure there were other ways
![img](images/Items/Rock.jpg)
You wash the rock clean. When you take a closer look at the rock's outer layer you notice the strange matter attatched to it. It doesn't look mossy at all.
On even closer inspection it's almost as if they are tiny tentacles.
Ew... that's so weird. At least they aren't moving or anything

You decide to let the rock dry on the counter as you change your uniform in more comfier evening clothes

我到底為什麼要這麼蠢才能在這玩意兒上撒尿？我確信還有其他方法

![img](images/Items/Rock.jpg)

你把石頭洗乾淨。當您仔細觀察岩石的外層時，您會注意到附著在其上的奇怪物質。它看起來一點也不長滿青苔。
更仔細地觀察，它們幾乎就像是微小的觸手。
呃……這太奇怪了。至少他們沒有動或什麼的

當你換上更舒適的晚禮服時，你決定讓岩石在櫃檯上晾乾

passages.name: more comfier evening clothes
passages.content:
![img](images/Characters/You/Base/Casual_Home.png)

You take the bag out of your backpack and drop the rock in the sink. You throw away the stinky platic bag.
why the hell did I have to be so stupid to pee on the thing? I'm sure there were other ways
![img](images/Items/Rock.jpg)
You wash the rock clean. When you take a closer look at the rock's outer layer you notice the strange matter attatched to it. It doesn't look mossy at all.
On even closer inspection it's almost as if they are tiny tentacles.
Ew... that's so weird. At least they aren't moving or anything

You decide to let the rock dry on the counter as you change your uniform in more comfier evening clothes.

As you return you notice the rock has moved.
what? no way
You take a close look again and you can see it is indeed slowly walking on the earlier noticed tentacles
"fuck me, that's nasty" you exclaim
you pick up the rock and carefully rub the tentacles.
You feel a slight jolt of electricity running from your fingers as you hear a voice booming in your head:"Who here has awaken me?!"
Scared you drop the rock back on the counter.
"Who said that?" you ask out loud. You take a look at the rock again.
was that you?
You pick up the rock again and touch the tentacle part of it
A slight jolt enters your finger again as you hear the same voice but a bit less booming:"I am so sorry, I didn't mean to scare you I..."
It was cut off as you release your finger again. You pinch your arm to see if you're not dreaming again.
ouuch
It appears not.
You reach for the tentacles, the now familiar jolt and voice return.
"Ehm.. hello? Yeah? You're ready now?" it asks you
"Who are you?" you ask the voice "Are you the rock?"
"Well... yes and no." it answers "you see, I am attached to this rock. but my soul is not of this rock. I am far older. As to answer your first question let me read your mind quickly to see how much you know already"
You suddenly see spots as if standing up to quickly and grab a nearby stool to sit down.
"Sorry" the voice apologized "Should've warned you. You wouldn't be the first master to fall and get a serious injury"
You hear what it's saying to you but you feel like all your energy was sapped away.
"Again sorry, but I had to know what and who I was dealing with. As for you, you're dealing with something that you would call something in between a genie or a djinn. There's not really a known word for what I am exactly"
You process what it said to you and ask the most obvious question: "So... you grant wishes?"
It remains silent
"Oh sorry" It spoke again "I nodded but I forgot I was a rock"
"You forgot?" you say. "How did you become one?"
"Oh that's a long story that I'm sure you don't have the energy nor comprehension for right now. but long story short my soul is bound to this stone by a greater power than me. ...
... You're puzzled. Basically, yes, I grant wishes. Unlimited wishes, I am here to serve so that's why I call you master. But don't get me wrong! I am not bound to any curse or contract. I remain my own master, I can refuse anything you want from me"

You realize pure magic is in the palm of your hand, literally.
You could rule the world if you wished so.
"Nope" the voice sais
"You can read my mind?" you ask it
"As long as you hold me by the synapses I can read your mind and you can hear me. I will always be able to hear you when nearby but only read your mind if you hold me down there" it replies
"So... what can I call you?" you ask
The genie seems to think for a while "Hmmm, call me Cosmos. Or genie if you want. But I name myself Cosmos for now since I can't really remember my real name... that is if I actually have a name"
"Okay... Cosmos... sounds cool"
"haha, thanks" the genie laughs "And come on. Make a first wish. I have been flying around for a while and I'm bored. Don't think to much of it. As I said, unlimited wishes. Oh and I'm not here to trick you or anything."

You put Cosmos down to think about a wish 'in private' for a short while.
Not too long, Cosmos seems eager and to be fair... so am I

You pick the stone back up and speak to it:"Okay Cosmos, are you ready?"
"Always!" It replies. You can hear in the voice that it's smiling
"Well then, I wish..."

wish for dream girl (let's get kinky today)
passages.content_zh:
![img](images/Characters/You/Base/Casual_Home.png)

你從背包裡拿出袋子，把石頭丟進水槽裡。你丟掉臭塑膠袋。
我到底為什麼要這麼蠢才能在這玩意兒上撒尿？我確信還有其他方法
![img](images/Items/Rock.jpg)
你把石頭洗乾淨。當您仔細觀察岩石的外層時，您會注意到附著在其上的奇怪物質。它看起來一點也不長滿青苔。
更仔細地觀察，它們幾乎就像是微小的觸手。
呃……這太奇怪了。至少他們沒有動或什麼的

當你換上更舒適的晚禮服時，你決定讓岩石在櫃檯上晾乾。

當你回來時，你發現岩石已經移動了。
什麼？沒辦法
再仔細一看，它確實是在之前註意到的觸手上慢慢行走
「幹我，這太噁心了」你喊道
你撿起岩石並小心地摩擦觸手。
當你聽到腦海中響起一個聲音時，你會感覺到一股輕微的電流從你的手指上流過：“誰喚醒了我？！”
害怕你把石頭掉回櫃檯上。
「誰說的？」你大聲問。你再看看那塊岩石。
是你嗎？
你再次拿起岩石並觸摸它的觸手部分
你的手指再次感到輕微的震動，你聽到同樣的聲音，但不再那麼洪亮：“我很抱歉，我不是故意嚇唬你的，我……”
當你再次鬆開手指時，它就被切斷了。你捏捏自己的手臂，看看自己是不是又在做夢了。
哎喲
看來不是。
你伸手去觸觸手，現在熟悉的震動和聲音又回來了。
「嗯..你好嗎？是嗎？你現在準備好了嗎？」它問你
“你是誰？”你問那個聲音“你是岩石嗎？”
「嗯……是的，也不是。」它回答“你看，我附著在這塊岩石上。但我的靈魂不屬於這塊岩石。我老了很多。至於回答你的第一個問題，讓我快速讀懂你的想法，看看你已經知道了多少”
你突然看到斑點，好像趕緊站起來，抓起附近的凳子坐下。
“抱歉，”那個聲音抱歉道，“應該警告你的。你不會是第一個摔倒受重傷的主人。”
你聽到它對你說的話，但你感覺你所有的能量都被耗盡了。
「再次抱歉，但我必須知道我在和什麼人打交道。至於你，你正在面對一種介於精靈或神靈之間的東西。沒有一個已知的詞可以確切地描述我到底是什麼”
你處理它對你說的話，並問最明顯的問題：“那麼……你會實現願望嗎？”
它保持沉默
“哦，抱歉”它又開口了，“我點了點頭，但我忘記了我是一塊石頭”
「你忘了？」你說。 “你是怎麼成為其中一員的？”
「哦，這是一個很長的故事，我確信你現在沒有精力或理解力。但長話短說，我的靈魂被比我更強大的力量束縛在這塊石頭上......
……你很困惑。基本上，是的，我滿足願望。無限的願望，我是來服務的，所以我叫你主人。但別誤會我的意思！我不受任何詛咒或契約的約束。我仍然是我自己的主人，我可以拒絕你想要的任何東西。 」

你意識到純粹的魔法就在你的手掌中，這不是誇張。
如果你願意的話，你可以統治世界。
「不」那個聲音說
「你能讀懂我的心思嗎？」你問它
「只要你按住我的突觸，我就能讀懂你的想法，你也能聽到我的聲音。當我在附近時，我總是能聽到你的聲音，但只有當你把我壓在那裡時，我才能讀懂你的想法」它回复
「那……我該怎麼稱呼你呢？」你問
精靈似乎想了一會兒“嗯，叫我宇宙。或者精靈，如果你願意的話。但我現在給自己起名叫宇宙，因為我真的記不起我的真名了……也就是說，如果我真的有名字的話。”
“好吧…宇宙…聽起來很酷”
「哈哈，謝謝，」精靈笑道，“來吧，許個第一個願望吧。我已經飛來飛去有一段時間了，我很無聊。別想太多。就像我說的，無限的願望。哦，我不是來欺騙你的。”

你暫時放下 Cosmos 的想法，「私下」思考一個願望。
不久之後，宇宙似乎很渴望並且公平……我也是
你把石頭撿起來並對它說話：“好吧，宇宙，你準備好了嗎？”
「總是！」它回覆了。你可以從聲音中聽出它在微笑
“那麼，我希望…”

passages.name: feel your face reshape maid
passages.content:
![img](images/Characters/You/MarkDream/Transform_Maid/Phase2.png)

As Mark presses the conform body button. You're both scared and intrigued.
On one hand it's scary to transform, on the other you're curious how you will turn out.
At first you feel an itch on your head as your hair grows.
Then the itch starts to hurt when you feel your face reshape
A wave of numbness washes over you as your limbs reshape, leaving you shorter in the process

This app is amazing. While you feel up your body a bit Mark calls you over.
"Look at this" he sais. He points at a small text in the corner of your model that states '>Subject>Female>'
He presses the button and an options menu appears.
There are lots of sliders. Mark is amazed as he walks away from you.
"If this is true I can fully customize you!"
The thought scares you a bit
"Wait, Mark. Don't.." you start as you get interrupted
"Oh what's this? 'Enhance'?" He sais as he presses the phone

passages.name: wish for dream girl
passages.content:
"I wish the girl of my dreams was standing right here in my kitchen. Oh and make her so horny she needs to fuck!"
...
...
There is no response
"Cosmos, you there?"
"Yeah sorry, just needed to process. You're that desperate?"
"Yeah well... sort of. And eh, unlimited wishes you know so I just went for something that first came to mind"
"Hey no judgement. So eh, wich girl exactly? You dream of a variety of different girls"
"Oh ehm. I meant a girl from my dreams figuratively. A girl I'd find really attractive."
"Okay, can do"
"Oh wait"
"What is it, master?"
"Don't do an existing girl. As it would be a lot to explain"
"Oh, so I get creative liberty?"
"Ehm, sure"
"Okay, here we go. Now I will drain some of your energy to use my powers. Nothing permanent or damaging but you might become desoriented"
"Oh, no problem."
"Then let's get started. Try to think of potential details as I start creating"

Allright!

You close your eyes
passages.content_zh:
“我希望我的夢想女孩站在我的廚房裡。哦，讓她如此飢渴，她需要性交！”
…
…
沒有回應
“宇宙，你在嗎？”
“是的，抱歉，只是需要處理。你就這麼絕望嗎？”
“是的，好吧……有點。呃，無限的願望，你知道，所以我只是選擇了首先想到的東西”
“嘿，沒有判斷力。所以呃，到底是哪個女孩？你夢想著各種各樣不同的女孩”
「哦嗯。我指的是我夢中的一個女孩。一個我覺得非常有吸引力的女孩。”
“好的，可以”
“哦等等”
“什麼事，主人？”
“不要做一個現有的女孩。因為這需要解釋很多”
“哦，所以我獲得了創作自由？”
“嗯，當然”
“好吧，讓我們開始吧。現在我會消耗你的一些能量來使用我的力量。沒有什麼永久的或破壞性的，但你可能會變得迷失方向”
“哦，沒問題。”
“那麼讓我們開始吧。在我開始創作時嘗試考慮潛在的細節”

好吧！

你閉上眼睛

“它更長了！”“它是$hair_colour！”

您很高興在開始小便之前註意到它，因為這不是夢！
你的手會自動伸向你的新資產。
岩石裡有什麼！
你趕緊拿了一些內衣。那裡有一種間隙，感覺很奇怪。
然後你跑回廚房
“宇宙你在嗎？！”
當然沒有回應。你需要先抓住石頭。
當你到達廚房時，立即聞到雞蛋和培根的味道。
你注意到岩石正在做早餐。
“怎麼在…”
他不能遠距離跟我說話，但他可以為我做早餐嗎？
您注意到岩石旁邊的櫃檯上已經有一個漂亮的盤子在等著您。
你抓住那塊石頭。
“早安，主人！”
“嗯，你對一個受到懲罰的人來說心情真是太好了”
“是的，我是。我很高興我能把它拋在腦後”
“那你的懲罰具體是什麼？”
你一邊吃早餐一邊問。
“不，我不想談論它。它會喚起令人不愉快的回憶。而且它超出了你的理解範圍。並不是說你愚蠢，主人！”
“好吧……好吧。這對你來說可能沒有對我那麼嚴重，但我昨晚感覺自己受到了懲罰”
“是的，抱歉，主人。恕我直言，誤會是雙向的。也許我很愚蠢，但也可能是您不夠清楚。”
你沒想到有人會用這樣的嘴巴稱呼你為主人，但你並不介意。你其實更喜歡精靈對你誠實。
「對」你開始。 “那麼我們首先要感謝你提供的美味早餐。我快餓死了”
「我想。大多數大師在被魔法使用後都會產生相當大的胃口。」
“談論魔法。我是否也希望能夠聽到你的聲音。”
「是的！謝謝你。我更大的懲罰之一是，如果你在觀看距離之內，你就能聽到我的聲音。但規則不允許我提出這個建議。再說一次，主人，你很聰明。把我放下，這樣你就可以用雙手抓那個三明治了。”
你就這樣做吧。
“還有，既然你會做早餐，我可以假設你也能收拾東西嗎？”
“只要有一個小小的願望，我就能做到”
“在這種情況下，我希望房子乾淨整潔，如果我有很多時間和動力的話，我就會整理它。”
你可以看到灰塵消失在你幾乎夠不到的角落後面，廚房也從來沒有像突然那樣閃亮過。
感謝上帝，我的房間在別人看到之前就已經乾淨了
“Cosmos，再次感謝您提供的豐盛早餐，但我覺得我們昨天還沒有完成”
“啊，是的，我想你想改回來？”

是的，請繼續！
實際上...

passages.content_zh: 待續

passages.name: actually...
passages.content:
You've been thinking about it last night and also during your conversation with the genie.
"Actually?" Cosmos sounds a bit too excited
"Yeah... I've been thinking. It's easy to turn me back, right?"
"Yes, really easy!"
"Well, in that case, I kinda want to continue this transformation. I have to admit I am quite curious"
"I was actually surprised you haven't invited a man over. Most of my other masters that changed gender did it with the intend to either trick someone or explore the experience themselves. It always ended up in a mating ritual"
Oh if I knew someone that wouldn't ask questions I might have done
"Well yeah, it's hard to explain to anyone I know. Or I do not know... both actually."
"I get it. so... how do you wanna do this."
"Well, what do you suggest?"
"As I see it you got two choices. Either you project outside of your body to look at the changes, or you stay inside to experience them."
"Ehm... why not both?"
"I can't split a soul buddy. That's way to dangerous and requires some Voldemort kind shit"
"I mean... hold on, wait here"
You go to the bedroom.
Damn, it really is clean here. Even the sheets got changed again
You grab your standing mirror and get back to the kitchen/living room.
You place the mirror.
"ta-da"
"Wait, master. Grab me please I can't quite make out what that is."
You pick the rock up and suddenly see spots.
"Oh wow. What is that device?"
"A mirror... you've never heard of it?"
"No, never."
"Darn, you must be really old then because these things have been around for millennia"
"Shit, I kinda understand how that works with the light... That's genius, your species keeps amazing me with the most niche things. But yeah, that's also an option. So I take it you want to stay in that body?"
"For sure"
"Allright, then put me down near the mirror so I can try to use it and let's continue"
passages.content_zh:
昨晚你一直在思考這個問題，在你與精靈的對話中也一直在思考這個問題。
「其實？」宇宙聽起來有點太興奮了
“是啊……我一直在想，要讓我回頭很容易，對吧？”
“是的，真的很簡單！”
“嗯，既然如此，我倒是有點想繼續這個轉變，不得不承認我很好奇。”
「事實上，我很驚訝你沒有邀請一個男人過來。我的其他主人中大多數改變性別的目的都是為了欺騙某人或自己探索這種經歷。它總是以交配儀式結束”
哦，如果我認識一個不會問問題的人，我可能會這麼做
“是的，這很難向我認識的人解釋。或者我不知道……實際上兩者都是。”
“我明白了。那麼……你想怎麼做呢？”
“嗯，你有什麼建議？”
“在我看來，你有兩種選擇。要么你投射到身體外面來觀察變化，要么你留在體內體驗它們。”
“嗯……為什麼不兩個都呢？”
“我不能分裂靈魂夥伴。這太危險了，需要一些伏地魔之類的東西”
“我的意思是……等一下，在這裡等一下”
你去臥室。
媽的，這裡真的很乾淨。連床單都換了
你拿起立鏡，回到廚房/客廳。
你把鏡子放好。
“達達”
“等等，主人。請抓住我，我不太明白那是什麼。”
你撿起石頭，突然看到了斑點。
“哇哦。那個裝置是什麼？”
“鏡子……你沒聽過嗎？”
“不，從來沒有。”
“該死，那你一定很老了，因為這些東西已經存在了幾千年了”
「媽的，我有點明白它是如何與光一起工作的……太天才了，你們的物種總是用最利基的東西讓我驚嘆不已。但是，是的，這也是一個選擇。所以我認為你想留在那個身體裡？”
“當然”
“好吧，那就把我放在鏡子附近，這樣我就可以嘗試使用它，然後我們繼續”

當你在床上跳起來時，你進一步伸展了一下身體，以消除你的警報。
你不是在做夢！你還是個貨真價實的女孩啊！
你很快就抓住了石頭
“宇宙你在嗎？！”
「哎呦餵！我睡著了，主人。有什麼可以幫您的嗎？”
“讓我變回原來的自己”
“如你所願”

當您感覺到骨頭重新排列時，您的身體會感到疼痛。當你的陰莖和球袋返回時，你的肉質胸部會向內恢復。
即使你認為你已經清理乾淨了。
當你把這些衣服放進衣櫃時，你只能想像人們如果發現它們會怎麼想。
當你意識到昨晚發生的事情時，你洗了個澡。
你很高興今天是星期六，因為在你去學校之前你有整個週末的時間來解決整個搖滾情況。
你換上一身休閒裝，走進廚房

passages.name: now what to do today?

You decide to visit your buddy Mark
You clean-up and take the rock in your pocket to visit Mark to mess around with the rock together... or maybe mess with him.
You walk about two blocks and approach his front door.
you ring the doorbell

你按門鈴

passages.name: Mark opens the door
passages.content: Double-click this passage to edit it.
passages.content_zh: 雙擊該段落進行編輯。

passages.name: A woman opens the door
passages.content:
You recognise the woman as Marcella, Mark's twin sister.

![img](images/Characters/Marcella/Scene/MorningYawn.png)

She yawns agressively. As she looks you up and down her morning crogginess seems to fade.
"Liam? Is that you?"
You knew Marcella a while before she went out of town to a different school.
She always was the smarter twin of the two.
You had a small crush on her for a while and actually used to buddy up with Mark to get closer to her.
But as your friendship with Mark grew your crush on her faded.
You still really like her but you see a bit too much of your best friend in her.

"Oh ehm, hi Marcella. I'm sorry to disturb you so early. Is Mark in?"
"Oh no worries. Eh, no. Mark is out. Not sure where he went, probably to the store to get some groceries. I kinda dropped by unexpected late last night"
"Oh can I ask why?"
"Yeah you can, but hurry in, it's kinda cold in the door"
You step inside
passages.content_zh:
你認出這個女人是馬克的雙胞胎妹妹瑪塞拉。

![img](images/Characters/Marcella/Scene/MorningYawn.png)
<跨距類別=“較小”>

她猛烈地打哈欠。當她上下打量你時，她早晨的頹廢似乎消失了。
“利亞姆？是你嗎？”
在瑪塞拉出城去另一所學校之前你就認識她一段時間了。
她總是兩個人中比較聰明的一個。
你曾經迷戀過她一段時間，並且實際上曾經和馬克成為好友以拉近與她的距離。
但隨著你和馬克的友誼加深，你對她的迷戀也逐漸消失。
你仍然很喜歡她，但你在她身上看到了太多你最好的朋友的影子。

“哦，嗯，嗨，瑪塞拉。很抱歉這麼早就打擾你。馬克在嗎？”
「哦，不用擔心。呃，不。馬克出去了。不知道他去了哪裡，可能去商店買了一些雜貨。昨晚我有點意外地過來了”
“噢，我可以問一下為什麼嗎？”
“可以，但是快點進去吧，門裡有點冷。”
你走進去

passages.name: You step inside
passages.content:
Once inside Marcella quickly gets past you and hurries over to the sofa.
She grabs a duvet and pillow from the couch (she clearly spend the night on) and throws them into what you know to be Mark's bedroom.
"Ah, so you really just dropped in unexpected?" You break the ice
"Ehm, yeah, kinda like you right now. Want anything to drink?"
"No thanks"
She grabs a drink for herself anyways.
"Yeah, no, I just finished the semester and have a week off so I thought I'd spend at least the weekend with Mark. Allthough he didn't really like me dropping in unannounced at midnight on a friday eve"
"Midnight eh?"
"Yeah, it was quite impuslive of me. Anyways, what brings you up to Mark's humble abode?"
You doubt for a second if you should let her in to the 'secret'.
You hold the rock as you say:"I wish I knew how to tell you this"
A voice in your head responds: "Dude, I'm not gonna waste magic on this. Just tell her and see where it leads"
You swallow your pride and place the rock on the kitchen counter.
"So I found this rock..."
"Ehm... okay, cool." She stares at it for a bit "So... what about it?"
Fuck this doesn't make for a great impression after a few years of no visual contact
"You probably won't believe me, but this rock can speak to me"
"Liam..." She looks at you in amazement. "Are you sure you don't want anything? Coffee? Energy Drink?"
"No-no" you interfere "It can speak. Come on Cosmos, I wish she can hear you as well"
"Well, for one: I'm not a party trick. And secondly"
"It's awefully quiet, Liam. Kinda awkward"
"One sec, Marcella, let me think"
"Secondly, I can only speak to my master. So you can hold the rock together and I might get a word or two for you"
You do as told. You grab Marcella's hand and place the rock inside, mossy part in her palm.
At first she just spaces out but then drops the rock in slight fear.
"WHAT-THE-FUCK LIAM! This isn't some funny prank, this creeps me out"
"Trust me" You tell her "Just listen to the rock explain itself"
She reluctantly picks up the rock again.
"INFINITE WISHES!?"
You notice you can't hear Cosmos' voice and try to hold the rock simultainiously.
"Welcome back, master. I've explained everything you know about me to mistress. Unfortunately it strains me too much to talk to both of you remotely so only the last person to touch me is master of the rockade"
"Liam... This is amazing. Where to begin?!"
"Well" you respond with a smirk "Ladies first" you offer her the stone
"Oh, so you wanna do this one at a time?"
"Yeah, as long as you keep it small, no big reality altering stuff, I think this could be fun"
"Liam, you have no idea but I kinda came prepared"
"What do you mean?"
passages.content_zh:
一進門，瑪塞拉就迅速地越過你，快步走到沙發旁。
她從沙發上抓起羽絨被和枕頭（她顯然是在上面過夜的），然後把它們扔進了馬克的臥室。
「啊，這麼說你真的是突然出現的？」你打破堅冰
“嗯，是的，有點像現在的你。想喝點什麼嗎？”
“不用了，謝謝”
不管怎樣，她還是給自己喝了一杯。
“是的，不，我剛剛完成了這個學期，有一周的假期，所以我想我至少應該和馬克一起度過週末。儘管他不太喜歡我在周五晚上的午夜突然來訪。”
“半夜啊？”
「是啊，我太衝動了。不管怎樣，是什麼風把你帶到馬克簡陋的住處來的？”
你懷疑是否應該讓她知道這個「秘密」。
你拿著石頭說：“我希望我知道如何告訴你這個”
你腦海中的一個聲音回應道：“夥計，我不會在這上面浪費魔法。只要告訴她，看看結果會怎樣。”
你放下你的驕傲，把石頭放在廚房的櫃檯上。
“所以我找到了這塊石頭……”
“嗯……好吧，酷。”她盯著它看了一會兒，“那麼……那又如何呢？”
他媽的，在幾年沒有視覺接觸後，這不會給人留下深刻的印象
“你可能不會相信我，但這塊石頭可以對我說話”
「利亞姆……」她驚訝地看著你。 “你確定不想要任何東西嗎？咖啡？能量飲料？”
“不不”你干涉“它會說話。來吧，Cosmos，我希望她也能聽到你的聲音”
“嗯，第一：我不是派對上的花招。第二”
“這裡非常安靜，利亞姆。有點尷尬”
“等一下，瑪塞拉，讓我想想”
“其次，我只能和我的主人說話。所以你可以把石頭抱在一起，我可能會幫你說一兩句話。”
你照著吩咐做。你抓住瑪塞拉的手，把石頭放進去，長滿青苔的部分放在她的手掌上。
起初她只是發呆，但後來因為輕微的恐懼而丟下了石頭。
“他媽的利亞姆！這不是什麼有趣的惡作劇，這讓我毛骨悚然”
“相信我”你告訴她“聽聽岩石的解釋吧”
她不情願地再次撿起石頭。
“無限的願望！？”
你注意到你聽不到科斯莫斯的聲音，並試圖同時握住岩石。
「歡迎回來，主人。我已經向女主人解釋了您所知道的關於我的一切。不幸的是，我太勞累了，無法與你們倆進行遠程交談，所以只有最後一個碰我的人才是岩石的主人”
“利亞姆……這太棒了。從哪裡開始？！”
「好」你笑著回應「女士優先」你把石頭遞給她
“哦，那麼你想一次做這個嗎？”
“是的，只要你保持小規模，沒有大的現實改變的東西，我認為這會很有趣”
“利亞姆，你不知道，但我是有準備的”
“你什麼意思？”

passages.name: What do you mean?
passages.content:
She starts to blush.
"I, ehm, fantasize about shit like this on the internet. I write short stories now and then"
"About infinite wishes? Don't tell me it's fetish stuff"
"No, no. Nothing like that. Well, everything is a fetish for someone"
"Should I worry? It's a lot for me to trust you while one could say we barely know each other"
"Oh hush, we know each other enough. Now let me think"
You worry a bit. She seems to have quite the conversation with the rock.
Her eyes darting between thoughts and you.
"Liam, I'm sorry. Cosmos convinced me this would be fine and not too weird. But I always wanted a look at myself. I wish you looked like me.
Like an exact clone."
"Oh come on" You complain.
You first notice your skin changing. Getting more tanned as your hairs soften.
passages.content_zh:
她開始臉紅。
“我，嗯，在網上幻想這樣的事情。我時不時寫一些短篇小說”
“關於無限願望？別告訴我這是戀物癖的東西”
“不，不。沒有那樣的事。好吧，一切都是某人的戀物癖”
“我該擔心嗎？我可以說我們幾乎不認識，但我很信任你”
“哦，噓，我們足夠了解了。現在讓我想想”
你有點擔心。她似乎與岩石有很好的對話。
她的目光在思想和你之間游移。
「利亞姆，我很抱歉。宇宙讓我相信這會很好，而且不會太奇怪。但我總是想看看自己。我希望你看起來像我。
就像一個精確的克隆人一樣。 」
「哦，來吧」你抱怨道。
您首先註意到您的皮膚發生變化。當頭髮軟化時，皮膚會變得更黑。

passages.content_zh:
![img](images/Characters/You/MarcellaClone/Phase05.png)
她開始臉紅。
“我，嗯，在網上幻想這樣的事情。我時不時寫一些短篇小說”
“關於無限願望？別告訴我這是戀物癖的東西”
“不，不。沒有那樣的事。好吧，一切都是某人的戀物癖”
“我該擔心嗎？我可以說我們幾乎不認識，但我很信任你”
“哦，噓，我們足夠了解了。現在讓我想想”
你有點擔心。她似乎與岩石有很好的對話。
她的目光在思想和你之間游移。
「利亞姆，我很抱歉。宇宙讓我相信這會很好，而且不會太奇怪。但我總是想看看自己。我希望你看起來像我。
就像一個精確的克隆人一樣。 」
「哦，來吧」你抱怨道。
您首先註意到您的皮膚發生變化。當頭髮軟化時，皮膚會變得更黑。當你的腳縮小幾個尺寸時，你的腿就會變短。接下來，你會感覺到你的手臂和腿失去了重量，它們也變硬了，但因為瑪塞拉顯然比你運動得更多。

不會再有

“天哪，你真是太可愛了”
當你長出尾巴時，你會感覺到另一次「抽氣」。將內褲拉到臀部之間，感覺不舒服
“我們不是答應過不戀物癖的嗎？”
「好吧，這不是我的。」瑪塞拉皺起眉頭，因為她無法放開你的小尾巴。 “而且，我也沒有答應過這樣的事”
“太好了。現在你完成後，把石頭遞給我，這樣我就可以恢復正常了”
「啊……」她上下打量著你。 “不”
“不？‘不’是什麼意思？”
“好吧，只有你保證在我們玩完之前不做任何事情，我才會把石頭交給你”
“我保證我們還沒玩完，但我真的感覺自己暴露在別人的身體裡，尤其是當它的主人站在我面前時”
“嗯，我想我明白你的意思了。抱歉我太投入了。這裡”
她把石頭遞給你。你夠到了，但她握住了。
「但這會讓你失去輪到你的機會。」她一邊說，一邊放開了手。
最後回到你希望的控制權：
「我要說得非常清楚：
我希望我看起來像昨天一樣”

passages.name: Schoolgirl_Blue
passages.content:
I wish I looked like I did yesterday
"I feel like I made a mistake"
"No wait Cosmos I-"
Marcella quickly grabs the rock
"Hohoho, nonono. I wanna see what kind of 'mistake' you made. This'll be great"
"Crap! Just give it back!"
You reach for it but she evades you.
"Stop it, I didn't realise you're such a kid, Liam"
"Aargh, fine. Enjoy the show I guess"
"Hey, looks like your head is at least human shaped again"
passages.content_zh:
我希望我看起來像昨天一樣
“我感覺我犯了一個錯誤”
“不等等，宇宙我—”
瑪塞拉迅速抓住了岩石
“呼呼呼，諾諾諾。我想看看你犯了什麼樣的‘錯誤’。這會很棒的”
“糟糕！還給我！”
你伸手去抓，但她卻躲開了你。
“別說了，我沒想到你是這樣的孩子，利亞姆”
“啊，好吧。我想請享受這個表演吧”
“嘿嘿，看來你的頭至少又變成人形了”

“呼呼呼，諾諾諾。我想看看你犯了什麼樣的‘錯誤’。這會很棒的”
“糟糕！還給我！”
你伸手去抓，但她卻躲開了你。
“別說了，我沒想到你是這樣的孩子，利亞姆”
“啊，好吧。我想請享受這個表演吧”
「嘿，看來你的頭至少又變成人形了。等等…」
“什麼？”
“你的臉變成粉紅色了嗎？”
你看著你的手臂

"Hey, looks like your head is at least human shaped again. Wait..."
"What?"
"Are you turning pink?"
You look at your arms
"Oh my god, you are"

瑪塞拉迅速抓住了岩石
“呼呼呼，諾諾諾。我想看看你犯了什麼樣的‘錯誤’。這會很棒的”
“糟糕！還給我！”
你伸手去抓，但她卻躲開了你。
“別說了，我沒想到你是這樣的孩子，利亞姆”
“啊，好吧。我想請享受這個表演吧”
「嘿，看來你的頭至少又變成人形了。等等…」
“什麼？”
“你的臉變成粉紅色了嗎？”
你看著你的手臂
“天哪，你真是。太可愛了。天啊，連眼睛的顏色都變了”
“天哪，這個粉紅色看起來很噁心”
正如你所說，皮毛開始脫落，你的絨毛也消失了
你不再是毛茸茸的了

passages.name: and your fluff dissappearsCasualTanktop_Pink
passages.content:
![img](images/Characters/You/MarcellaBunnyYesterday/Phase07_Pink.png)

I wish I looked like I did yesterday
"I feel like I made a mistake"
"No wait Cosmos I-"
Marcella quickly grabs the rock
"Hohoho, nonono. I wanna see what kind of 'mistake' you made. This'll be great"
"Crap! Just give it back!"
You reach for it but she evades you.
"Stop it, I didn't realise you're such a kid, Liam"
"Aargh, fine. Enjoy the show I guess"
"Hey, looks like your head is at least human shaped again. Wait..."
"What?"
"Are you turning pink?"
You look at your arms
"Oh my god, you are. That's so cuuute. Oh damn, even your eye color changed"
"Oh god, this pink looks disgusting"
As you say it the fur starts receeding and your fluff dissappears
You're no longer a furry

"I feel like I made a mistake"
"No wait Cosmos I-"
Marcella quickly grabs the rock
"Hohoho, nonono. I wanna see what kind of 'mistake' you made. This'll be great"
"Crap! Just give it back!"
You reach for it but she evades you.
"Stop it, I didn't realise you're such a kid, Liam"
"Aargh, fine. Enjoy the show I guess"
"Hey, looks like your head is at least human shaped again. Wait..."
"What?"
"Are you turning yellow?"
You look at your arms
passages.content_zh:
![img](images/Characters/You/MarcellaBunnyYesterday/Phase02_Blonde.png)
我希望我看起來像昨天一樣
“我感覺我犯了一個錯誤”
“不等等，宇宙我—”
瑪塞拉迅速抓住了岩石
“呼呼呼，諾諾諾。我想看看你犯了什麼樣的‘錯誤’。這會很棒的”
“糟糕！還給我！”
你伸手去抓，但她卻躲開了你。
“別說了，我沒想到你是這樣的孩子，利亞姆”
“啊，好吧。我想請享受這個表演吧”
「嘿，看來你的頭至少又變成人形了。等等…」
“什麼？”
“你變黃了嗎？”
你看著你的手臂

“什麼？”
“你變成棕色了嗎？”
你看著你的手臂
“天哪，原來是你啊。天啊，連眼睛的顏色都變了”
“哇哦，栗子看起來很奇怪，很適合兔子”
正如你所說，毛皮開始脫落

passages.name: EyeCasualTshirt_Blue
passages.content:
![img](images/Characters/You/MarcellaBunnyYesterday/Phase05_Blue.png)

I wish I looked like I did yesterday
"I feel like I made a mistake"
"No wait Cosmos I-"
Marcella quickly grabs the rock
"Hohoho, nonono. I wanna see what kind of 'mistake' you made. This'll be great"
"Crap! Just give it back!"
You reach for it but she evades you.
"Stop it, I didn't realise you're such a kid, Liam"
"Aargh, fine. Enjoy the show I guess"
"Hey, looks like your head is at least human shaped again. Wait..."
"What?"
"Are you turning blue?"
You look at your arms
"Oh my god, you are. Blue bunny, just like a cartoon. Damn, even your eye color changed"
"Oh god, this blue looks so unnatural"
As you say it the fur starts receeding
passages.content_zh:
![img](images/Characters/You/MarcellaBunnyYesterday/Phase05_Blue.png)
我希望我看起來像昨天一樣
“我感覺我犯了一個錯誤”
“不等等，宇宙我—”
瑪塞拉迅速抓住了岩石
“呼呼呼，諾諾諾。我想看看你犯了什麼樣的‘錯誤’。這會很棒的”
“糟糕！還給我！”
你伸手去抓，但她卻躲開了你。
“別說了，我沒想到你是這樣的孩子，利亞姆”
“啊，好吧。我想請享受這個表演吧”
「嘿，看來你的頭至少又變成人形了。等等…」
“什麼？”
“你臉色變藍了嗎？”
你看著你的手臂
“我的天啊，你是啊。藍色的小兔子，就像動畫片裡的一樣。媽的，連眼睛的顏色都變了。”
“天哪，這藍色看起來太不自然了”
正如你所說，毛皮開始脫落

passages.name: the fur starts receedingCasualTshirt_Red
passages.content:
![img](images/Characters/You/MarcellaBunnyYesterday/Phase06_Red.png)

I wish I looked like I did yesterday
"I feel like I made a mistake"
"No wait Cosmos I-"
Marcella quickly grabs the rock
"Hohoho, nonono. I wanna see what kind of 'mistake' you made. This'll be great"
"Crap! Just give it back!"
You reach for it but she evades you.
"Stop it, I didn't realise you're such a kid, Liam"
"Aargh, fine. Enjoy the show I guess"
"Hey, looks like your head is at least human shaped again. Wait..."
"What?"
"Are you turning pink?"
You look at your arms
"Oh my god, you are. Oh, I guess it's more red. Damn, even your eye color changed"
"Oh god, this red looks so unnatural"
As you say it the fur starts receeding and your fluff dissappears

“哦天哪，原來是這樣。哦，我猜它更像是金發碧眼的。該死，連眼睛的顏色都變了”
“哦，哇，金髮女郎看起來很奇怪，很適合兔子”
正如你所說，皮毛開始脫落，你的絨毛也消失了
你不再是毛茸茸的了
“看到自己這麼白真是太奇怪了”
她並排握住你的手臂並比較你的膚色
“哎呀，你那可愛的尾巴不見了。”
當你轉動頭部時，你會感覺到你的耳朵也在變化

passages.name: You're no longer a furryCasualTshirt_Chestnut
passages.content:
![img](images/Characters/You/MarcellaBunnyYesterday/Phase08_Chestnut.png)

I wish I looked like I did yesterday
"I feel like I made a mistake"
"No wait Cosmos I-"
Marcella quickly grabs the rock
"Hohoho, nonono. I wanna see what kind of 'mistake' you made. This'll be great"
"Crap! Just give it back!"
You reach for it but she evades you.
"Stop it, I didn't realise you're such a kid, Liam"
"Aargh, fine. Enjoy the show I guess"
"Hey, looks like your head is at least human shaped again. Wait..."
"What?"
"Are you turning brown?"
You look at your arms
"Oh my god, you are. Oh damn, even your eye color changed"
"Oh wow, chestnut looks weirdly fitting for a bunny"
As you say it the fur starts receeding and your fluff dissappears
You're no longer a furry
"It's so weird to see myself that white"
She holds your arms side by side and compares your skin colour
"Oh hey, your cute tail is gone."
As you turn your head you feel your ears change as well

passages.name: Oh my god, you areCasualTanktop_Red
passages.content:
![img](images/Characters/You/MarcellaBunnyYesterday/Phase04_Red.png)

Marcella quickly grabs the rock

"Crap! Just give it back!"

"Hey, looks like your head is at least human shaped again. Wait..."
"What?"
"Are you turning pink?"
You look at your arms
"Oh my god, you are. Oh, I guess it's more red. Damn, even your eye color changed"

“啊，好吧。我想請享受這個表演吧”
「嘿，看來你的頭至少又變成人形了。等等…」
“什麼？”
“你臉色變藍了嗎？”
你看著你的手臂
“天哪，原來是你啊”

passages.name: Oh my god, you areCasualTanktop_Blonde
passages.content:
![img](images/Characters/You/MarcellaBunnyYesterday/Phase04_Blonde.png)

I wish I looked like I did yesterday
"I feel like I made a mistake"

Marcella quickly grabs the rock
"Hohoho, nonono. I wanna see what kind of 'mistake' you made. This'll be great"
"Crap! Just give it back!"

"Stop it, I didn't realise you're such a kid, Liam"
"Aargh, fine. Enjoy the show I guess"
"Hey, looks like your head is at least human shaped again. Wait..."

"Are you turning yellow?"
You look at your arms
"Oh my god, you are. Oh, I guess it's more blond-ish. Damn, even your eye color changed"

「嘿，看來你的頭至少又變成人形了。等等…」
“什麼？”
“你臉色變藍了嗎？”
你看著你的手臂
“我的天啊，你是啊。藍色的小兔子，就像動畫片裡的一樣。媽的，連眼睛的顏色都變了。”
“天哪，這藍色看起來太不自然了”
正如你所說，皮毛開始脫落，你的絨毛也消失了
你不再是毛茸茸的了

passages.name: You're no longer a furryCasualTanktop_Blonde
passages.content:
![img](images/Characters/You/MarcellaBunnyYesterday/Phase08_Blonde.png)

I wish I looked like I did yesterday
"I feel like I made a mistake"
"No wait Cosmos I-"
Marcella quickly grabs the rock
"Hohoho, nonono. I wanna see what kind of 'mistake' you made. This'll be great"
"Crap! Just give it back!"
You reach for it but she evades you.
"Stop it, I didn't realise you're such a kid, Liam"
"Aargh, fine. Enjoy the show I guess"
"Hey, looks like your head is at least human shaped again. Wait..."
"What?"
"Are you turning yellow?"
You look at your arms
"Oh my god, you are. Oh, I guess it's more blond-ish. Damn, even your eye color changed"
"Oh wow, blonde looks weirdly fitting for a bunny"
As you say it the fur starts receeding and your fluff dissappears
You're no longer a furry
"It's so weird to see myself that white"
She holds your arms side by side and compares your skin colour
"Oh hey, your cute tail is gone."
As you turn your head you feel your ears change as well
passages.content_zh:
![img](images/Characters/You/MarcellaBunnyYesterday/Phase08_Blonde.png)
我希望我看起來像昨天一樣
“我感覺我犯了一個錯誤”
“不等等，宇宙我—”
瑪塞拉迅速抓住了岩石
“呼呼呼，諾諾諾。我想看看你犯了什麼樣的‘錯誤’。這會很棒的”
“糟糕！還給我！”
你伸手去抓，但她卻躲開了你。
“別說了，我沒想到你是這樣的孩子，利亞姆”
“啊，好吧。我想請享受這個表演吧”
「嘿，看來你的頭至少又變成人形了。等等…」
“什麼？”
“你變黃了嗎？”
你看著你的手臂
“哦天哪，原來是這樣。哦，我猜它更像是金發碧眼的。該死，連眼睛的顏色都變了”
“哦，哇，金髮女郎看起來很奇怪，很適合兔子”
正如你所說，皮毛開始脫落，你的絨毛也消失了
你不再是毛茸茸的了
“看到自己這麼白真是太奇怪了”
她並排握住你的手臂並比較你的膚色
“哎呀，你那可愛的尾巴不見了。”
當你轉動頭部時，你會感覺到你的耳朵也在變化

“呼呼呼，諾諾諾。我想看看你犯了什麼樣的‘錯誤’。這會很棒的”
“糟糕！還給我！”
你伸手去抓，但她卻躲開了你。
“別說了，我沒想到你是這樣的孩子，利亞姆”
“啊，好吧。我想請享受這個表演吧”
「嘿，看來你的頭至少又變成人形了。等等…」
“什麼？”
“你變成棕色了嗎？”
你看著你的手臂

passages.name: Are you turning Schoolgirl_Blue?
passages.content:
![img](images/Characters/You/MarcellaBunnyYesterday/Phase02_Blue.png)

I wish I looked like I did yesterday
"I feel like I made a mistake"
"No wait Cosmos I-"
Marcella quickly grabs the rock
"Hohoho, nonono. I wanna see what kind of 'mistake' you made. This'll be great"
"Crap! Just give it back!"
You reach for it but she evades you.
"Stop it, I didn't realise you're such a kid, Liam"
"Aargh, fine. Enjoy the show I guess"
"Hey, looks like your head is at least human shaped again. Wait..."
"What?"
"Are you turning blue?"
You look at your arms

passages.content:
![img](images/Characters/You/MarcellaBunnyYesterday/Phase06_Red.png)

I wish I looked like I did yesterday
"I feel like I made a mistake"
"No wait Cosmos I-"
Marcella quickly grabs the rock
"Hohoho, nonono. I wanna see what kind of 'mistake' you made. This'll be great"
"Crap! Just give it back!"
You reach for it but she evades you.
"Stop it, I didn't realise you're such a kid, Liam"
"Aargh, fine. Enjoy the show I guess"
"Hey, looks like your head is at least human shaped again. Wait..."
"What?"
"Are you turning pink?"
You look at your arms
"Oh my god, you are. Oh, I guess it's more red. Damn, even your eye color changed"
"Oh god, this red looks so unnatural"
As you say it the fur starts receeding and your fluff dissappears
passages.content_zh:
![img](images/Characters/You/MarcellaBunnyYesterday/Phase06_Red.png)
我希望我看起來像昨天一樣
“我感覺我犯了一個錯誤”
“不等等，宇宙我—”
瑪塞拉迅速抓住了岩石
“呼呼呼，諾諾諾。我想看看你犯了什麼樣的‘錯誤’。這會很棒的”
“糟糕！還給我！”
你伸手去抓，但她卻躲開了你。
“別說了，我沒想到你是這樣的孩子，利亞姆”
“啊，好吧。我想請享受這個表演吧”
「嘿，看來你的頭至少又變成人形了。等等…」
“什麼？”
“你的臉變成粉紅色了嗎？”
你看著你的手臂
“天哪，原來是這樣。哦，我猜它更紅了。媽的，連眼睛的顏色都變了”
“天哪，這個紅色看起來好不自然啊”
正如你所說，皮毛開始脫落，你的絨毛也消失了

passages.name: the fur starts receedingSchoolgirl_Blonde
passages.content:
![img](images/Characters/You/MarcellaBunnyYesterday/Phase06_Blonde.png)

I wish I looked like I did yesterday

"Crap! Just give it back!"

"Stop it, I didn't realise you're such a kid, Liam"
"Aargh, fine. Enjoy the show I guess"
"Hey, looks like your head is at least human shaped again. Wait..."
"What?"
"Are you turning yellow?"
You look at your arms
"Oh my god, you are. Oh, I guess it's more blond-ish. Damn, even your eye color changed"
"Oh wow, blonde looks weirdly fitting for a bunny"
As you say it the fur starts receeding and your fluff dissappears

passages.content_zh:
![img](images/Characters/You/MarcellaBunnyYesterday/CasualTshirt/Phase21_Blue.png)
“你的臉色剛剛變了嗎？”
當你的褲子被拉下來並分成兩根絲襪時，你發出吱吱聲
然後你會感覺到內褲被拉下來。
你試著抓住，但它們折斷並掉到地上。它們在那裡綁住你的腳，最後也分裂成一些藍色的緊身鞋
“嘿！”瑪塞拉大聲說道：“科斯莫斯，你已經快要跨越界限了”
她似乎環顧四周
你遮住你的胯部
“你在找什麼？”
她回頭看著你
“把手拿開！”
你的手又回來了
“我發誓我把石頭扔到了這附近的某個地方”
“你丟了？！”
“呃……以後再說吧。應該就在這附近吧。你的衣服還在換呢”
當你的襯衫也落下時，她指著你的胸部
“好吧，操我。如果你只是想換一條新的，為什麼要脫掉我的內褲”
你摀著胸口。當你刷乳頭時你會跳起來
瑪塞拉笑了。 “這不是你所習慣的，是嗎？”
你的背部開始感覺奇怪，因為你可以感覺到自己長高了
當你感覺到你的頭快要爆炸時，這種感覺會延伸到你的脖子
您感覺很不平衡，但隨著身體重塑，軀幹感覺臃腫
“Daamn boah。你本來就是一個大塊頭？看看你與我的關係有多大。看到那些胸肌消失真是一種恥辱。我為他們努力工作”
當你感覺到乳頭灼燒你的乳房開始充盈時，你的頭腦仍然有點模糊，無法做出正確的反應
“它們很大！”
當她伸手去碰觸你的新胸部時，你的項鍊上開始長出一塊布料
當你的腕帶重新塑造成昨天的夾克時，你的手臂就會被推高，尺寸也會大幅增加
突然，一條毛巾從你知道是浴室的地方衝進來，抓住了你的腰。然後它變成藍色並重塑成裙子
當你的頭髮變成你昨天穿的樣子時，你的造型就完成了

passages.name: as your hair remodels into however you worn it yesterdayCasualTshirt_Red
passages.content:
![img](images/Characters/You/MarcellaBunnyYesterday/CasualTshirt/Red.png)

Marcella looks at you in awe
"You look so cuute! Love the hair!"
She twirls your hair through her fingers before she stand back and looks you over
"I... I don't really get why you were so afraid. It's not thát humiliating"
"I guess I just didn't expect it. I wanted a soft reset and get back into my own body"
"Well, your own body is right here!"
She points at herself, reminding your previously bad worded wish
"I guess I just can't really phrase wishes well" you sigh
"Aw, don't be so down on yourself. The ears were pretty fun"
"I guess..."
You take a look at Marcella. She's playing with her ears. She looks pretty cute.
"Honestly Liam, I wish I could rock an outfit like that. If you went out like that you'd look like you'd own the place"
Then a flash of light blinded you
passages.content_zh:
![img](images/Characters/You/MarcellaBunnyYesterday/CasualTshirt/Red.png)
瑪塞拉敬畏地看著你
“你看起來很可愛！喜歡你的頭髮！”
她用手指捻弄你的頭髮，然後退後一步打量你
“我……我真的不明白你為什麼這麼害怕。這並沒有那麼丟臉”
“我想我只是沒想到。我想要一個軟重置並回到我自己的身體”
“嗯，你自己的身體就在這裡！”
她指著自己，提醒你之前措詞不好的願望
「我想我只是不能很好地表達願望」你嘆息道
“哎呀，別太小看自己了。耳朵還挺好玩的。”
“我猜…”
你看看瑪塞拉。她在玩弄耳朵。她看起來很可愛。
“老實說，利亞姆，我希望我能穿那樣的衣服。如果你像那樣出去，你看起來就像是你擁有這個地方一樣”
然後一道閃光讓你失明

然後你突然想到，瑪塞拉在你丟了石頭後許了一個願
「等等，瑪塞拉。你剛才的願望似乎實現了。你就不能只許願那塊石頭嗎？”
她的耳朵豎起來
“哦，是的，既然你提到了。我希望我有那塊石頭！”
她舉起手，但什麼事也沒發生。
媽的
“嗯，怎麼樣。我希望利亞姆再次看起來像利亞姆，穿著他自己的衣服”
當你的身體開始疼痛并迅速重塑舊的自我時，它似乎起作用了。當你睜開眼睛時，你看起來又像以前的你了。
“噢，回來的感覺真好”
然而，然後你發現瑪塞拉在你面前完全赤身裸體

![img](images/Characters\Marcella\Base\Bunnyears\BreastSwapNaked.png)

“哎呀，我猜它把你的衣服脫掉了！”
她試圖掩蓋自己一點
哇哦，確實也複製了皮膚
當你感覺到褲子裡有一種熟悉的膨脹感時，你臉紅了一點。您試圖掩蓋最終的隆起，但這只會引起您對胯部的注意
馬塞拉·士力架
“天哪。我看到你的舊設備回來了”
“我很抱歉”
你尷尬地轉過身。
“別擔心利亞姆，你已經見過我裸體好幾次了”
“還是感覺不對勁，尤其是當你無意的時候”
“讓我們對你做同樣的事情：我希望我能再次像我一樣，穿著我的舊衣服”

什麼也沒發生

“糟糕，利亞姆，這次沒成功”
“我希望如此”
突然，你感覺一股熱氣從後背傳來。你把手伸向四周，它就在那裡，那塊岩石。
「等等，你一直把它放在口袋裡！”
你沮喪地轉過身，舉起石頭，正好趕上瑪塞拉再次穿上衣服。
“嗯……哎呀”
你們盯著每個人看了一會兒，然後開始大笑。
你們兩個決定在馬克回家之前結束這次“會議”

passages.name: search the room for the rock casualtanktop
passages.content:
After a few minutes of searching (wich felt like hours) you start to panic a bit.
"I'm not stuck like this am I?!"
"You? These bunny ears are cute and all but not exactly normal"
"Sorry, guess we both struggle"
"Aw don't worry about it. I had fun"
"I was being cynical, I'm pretty sure being stuck as the opposite gender is worse than having animal ears"
"Oh hell no. You look normal, you can act like you've always been her. How am I supposed to just casually walk around with rabbit ears without being studied by doctors."
"Okay, it's certainly weird but I don't have some second identity I could use. The real me is suddenly missing while this girl is a Jane Doe without family or anything."
Marcella crosses her arms
"Hmpf... pretty good point. I guess we're both fucked"
You get on your knees and start checking under furniture again.
Marcella speaks up again:"You know, the phrasing wasn't that bad"
You sit up and look at her
"How?" You ask
"At least you remembered we were still in each others body"
"yeah, I could've wished something along the line of my body returning to normal, turning you back into me. I guess I should've wished we first reswapped bodies again"
"I wish you did"
passages.content_zh:
經過幾分鐘的搜索（感覺像幾個小時），你開始有點慌張。
“我沒有被困成這樣吧？！”
“你？這些兔子耳朵很可愛，但又不太正常”
“抱歉，我猜我們都在掙扎”
“噢，別擔心。我玩得很開心”
“我很憤世嫉俗，我很確定被困住，因為異性比擁有動物耳朵更糟糕”
“天哪，不。你看起來很正常，你可以表現得就像你一直是她一樣。我怎麼能在沒有醫生檢查的情況下，帶著兔子耳朵隨意走動呢。”
「好吧，這確實很奇怪，但我沒有可以使用的第二個身份。真正的我突然消失了，而這個女孩是一個沒有家人或任何東西的無名氏。”
瑪塞拉交叉雙臂
“哼……說得好。我想我們都完蛋了”
你跪下來，再次開始檢查家具底下。
瑪塞拉再次開口：“你知道，措辭並沒有那麼糟糕”
你坐起來看著她
「怎麼樣？」你問
“至少你記得我們還在彼此的身體裡”
“是的，我本可以希望我身體上的某些東西恢復正常，把你變回我。我想我應該希望我們首先再次交換身體”
“我希望你這麼做”

passages.name: The two of you decided to call it quits for this 'session' before Mark came home
passages.content:
![img](images/Characters/You/Base/Casual.png)

TO BE CONTINUED
passages.content_zh:
![img](images/Characters/You/Base/Casual.png)
待續

passages.name: "I wish you did"
passages.content:
![img](images/Characters/Marcella/Base/Bunnyears/LiamClothes.png)

You feel like being catapulted once again as you perspective changed.
"Wait how did?"
In front of you is Marcella, this time full time bunnygirl, like she was before

![img](images/Characters\Marcella\Base\Bunnygirl\scene\PyjamasKneeled.png)

"Marcella?"
"Oh god it feels so fluffy!"
"Wait, how did this happen"
You feel something in your back pocket. You take it out. It's the Rock!
"Oh god, you had it this whole time? It legit had me stressing!"
"Gotcha! haha. I just wanted to surprise you that's all. I love your, well... my face when it gets surprised. I also wanted to test the limits on wishes like 'what if'"
You stare as she plays with her fuzzy cleavage acting pure innocence.
"Allright, that's it. Playtime is over for now. Let's return to our original shapes"
"Aw, do we have to? I kinda like this fuzzy feeling"
"Well, I'm done playing so I'll probably go home. I can't leave you like this. What if your brother gets home? How are you gonna explain yourself?"
"Oh my god, you gave me the greatest idea!"
You massage your temples
"Seriously, you're giving me a headache"
"Hear me out, what if we prank him. He can be home any minute now. What if we both look like original me and be at two places at once"
"Marcella... that sounds | tempting | tiring |
passages.content_zh:
![img](images/Characters/Marcella/Base/Bunnyears/LiamClothes.png)
當你的觀點改變時，你會感覺再次被彈射出去。
“等等，怎麼辦？”
前面是瑪塞拉，這次是全職兔女郎，就像她以前一樣

![img](images/Characters\Marcella\Base\Bunnygirl\scene\PyjamasKneeled.png)
<跨距類別=“較小”>

“瑪塞拉？”
“天啊，感覺好蓬鬆啊！”
“等等，這是怎麼發生的”
你感覺到後口袋裡有東西。你把它拿出來。這是岩石！
“天啊，你一直都這樣？這讓我壓力很大！”
「明白了！哈哈。我只是想給你一個驚喜，僅此而已。我愛你，嗯……我驚訝時的表情。我還想測試一下‘假設’之類的願望的極限。”
你盯著她玩弄她模糊的乳溝，表現出純粹的天真。
“好了，就這樣了，遊戲時間到此結束了，我們恢復原來的樣子吧。”
“噢，我們必須這樣做嗎？我有點喜歡這種模糊的感覺”
「好吧，我玩完了，所以我可能要回家了。我不能就這樣離開你。如果你哥哥回家了怎麼辦？你要怎麼解釋？”
“天啊，你給了我最好的主意！”
你按摩太陽穴
“說實話，你讓我很頭痛”
「聽我說，如果我們惡作劇他怎麼辦。他現在隨時都可以回家。如果我們都像原來的我一樣，同時出現在兩個地方怎麼辦？”
「瑪塞拉…這聽起來|誘人|累人|
